ticket_decisions.outage_id: string; empty string when none applies
ticket_decisions.escalation_team: enum: NONE | TIER2_SUPPORT | FIELD_OPS | NETWORK_ENGINEERING | ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE
ticket_decisions.resolution_route: enum: AUTO_TROUBLESHOOTING | OUTAGE_WAIT | ESCALATION | INELIGIBLE_ACCOUNT | AUTH_FAILED | INVALID_ACCOUNT
